title: Automation for hidden columns
excerpt: I’m using several boards and dashboards to manage a large scale production project. Automations are a lifesaver for a lot of this but I really need to be able to automate hidden columns. Many columns on my boards are hid…

posts.author: CWoolfe (Catherine Woolfe)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m using several boards and dashboards to manage a large scale production project. Automations are a lifesaver for a lot of this but I really need to be able to automate hidden columns. Many columns on my boards are hidden because we have project stakeholders on the boards as guests. We don’t need them seeing all information that relates to production but it would be highly efficient for our team (who are the ones paying for monday!) to be able to automate all columns, hidden or not.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 on this one. automation on hidden columns
